TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Fudafudak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 152 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 10 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 142 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga Dikidiki. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Fudafudak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč *u*a*u*ak …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ő≤einan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj mkraja Ē na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj Ēzil na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a *iki*iki. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč *u*a*u*ak …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Fudafudak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 152 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 10 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 142 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga Dikidiki. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Fudafudak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč *u*a*u*ak …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ő≤einan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj mkraja Ē na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj Ēzil na *u*a*u*ak ńßja Ē …£a *iki*iki. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč *u*a*u*ak …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
